mapper.select: /* SQL-ID : DashboardDAO.listSysReschRecent, TODO: srvyList 설 명 : 설문목록조회 */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.SRVY_ID , A.SRVY_TTL , TO_CHAR(A.SRVY_SDTTM, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS SRVY_SDTTM , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USER WHERE USER_ID = A.RGTR_ID) AS RGTRNM , TO_CHAR(A.REG_DTTM, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS FRST_INQ_DTTM , CASE WHEN A.REG_DTTM > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 7, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS IS_NEW , ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_PTCP AA WHERE AA.SRVY_ID = A.SRVY_ID) AS RESCH_JOIN_USER_CNT FROM TB_LMS_SRVY SRVY WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' /* 사용여부 */ AND A.USEYN = 'Y' /* 삭제여부 */ AND A.SRVY_QSTNS_CMPTNYN = 'Y' /* 설문 출제 완료 여부 */ AND A.SRVY_TYCD = 'HOME' ORDER BY A.REG_DTTM DESC ) A WHERE ROWNUM = < #{listScale}

/* SQL ID : DashboardDAO.listCurTerm 설 명 : 현재학기 조회 */ SELECT CRS_SMSTR_ID , SMSTRNM , DGRS_YR , DGRS_SMSTR , A.OP_SDTTM , A.OP_EDTTM FROM CRS_SMSTR A WHERE A.SMSTR_STSCD = 'SERVICE' AND SMSTR_TYCD = 'NORMAL' AND A.OP_SDTTM <= FN_DTTM() AND A.OP_EDTTM >= FN_DTTM() AND A.ORG_ID = #{orgId} ORDER BY A.DGRS_YR DESC, CASE WHEN A.DGRS_SMSTR = 2 THEN 3 WHEN A.DGRS_SMSTR = 3 THEN 2 ELSE A.DGRS_SMSTR END DESC

/* SQL ID : DashboardDAO.listStdTerm 설 명 : 수강생 학기목록 조회 쿼리 수정 : */ SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT SC.SMSTR_CHRT_ID AS SMSTR_CHRT_ID, SC.SMSTR_CHRTNM AS SMSTR_CHRTNM, SC.DGRS_YR, SC.DGRS_SMSTR_CHRT AS DGRS_SMSTR_CHRT, SC.NOW_SMSTRYN FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT SO, TB_LMS_SMSTR_CHRT SC, TB_LMS_ATNDLC ATND WHERE 1 = 1 AND SO.SBJCT_ID = ATND.SBJCT_ID AND SO.SMSTR_CHRT_ID = SC.SMSTR_CHRT_ID AND ATND.USER_ID = #{userId} AND SO.DELYN = 'N' AND SO.USEYN = 'Y' ) A WHERE 1 = 1 GROUP BY A.SMSTR_CHRT_ID, A.SMSTR_CHRTNM, A.DGRS_YR, A.DGRS_SMSTR_CHRT, A.NOW_SMSTRYN ORDER BY A.DGRS_YR DESC, A.DGRS_SMSTR_CHRT DESC

/* SQL ID : DashboardDAO.profSmstrList 설 명 : 교수학기목록조회 */ SELECT SBJCT_ID , SBJCTNM , SBJCT_YR , SBJCT_SMSTR , USEYN -- 현재 학기인지에 대한 여부(NOW_SMSTRYN 이였으나 임시로 USEYN) FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT WHERE 1 = 1 AND PROF_ID = #{userId} AND DELYN = 'N' AND USEYN = 'Y' AND SBJCT_TYCD = 'UNI'

/* SQL ID : DashboardDAO.profSmstrList 설 명 : 교수학기목록조회 */ SELECT SBJCT_ID , SBJCTNM , SBJCT_YR , SBJCT_SMSTR , USEYN -- 현재 학기인지에 대한 여부(NOW_SMSTRYN 이였으나 임시로 USEYN) FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT WHERE 1 = 1 AND PROF_ID = #{userId} AND DELYN = 'N' AND USEYN = 'Y' AND SBJCT_TYCD = 'UNI'

/* SQL ID : DashboardDAO.listStdUncompletedLesson 설 명 : 학생 미완료 강의 조회 */
WITH BASE AS ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY A.SBJCT_ID ORDER BY B.LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ DESC) AS RN , A.SBJCT_ID , A.SBJCTNM , A.DVCLAS_NO , B.LCTR_SCHDL_ID , B.LCTR_SCHDLNM , B.LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ , B.LCTR_TOC_LRN_SCNDS , C.ATNDLC_STSCD , C.STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL B ON A.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND ( FN_DT() >= B.LCTR_EYMD OR FN_DT() BETWEEN B.LCTR_SYMD AND B.LCTR_EYMD ) JOIN TB_LMS_LESSON_STUDY_STATE C ON B.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = C.LCTR_SCHDL_ID AND C.ATNDLC_STSCD NOT IN ('COMPLETE', 'LATE') WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.ATNDLC_CERT_STSCD != 'CLOSE' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND STD_ID = C.STD_ID AND ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND USER_ID = #{userId} ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_TERM_CRE_CRS_RLTN AA JOIN CRS_SMSTR BB ON AA.CRS_SMSTR_ID = BB.CRS_SMSTR_ID AND BB.NOW_SMSTRYN = 'Y' AND BB.CRS_SMSTR_ID = #{termCd} WHERE SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID ) ), STUDY_TIME AS ( SELECT BASE.* , ( SELECT SUM(CC.STUDY_TOTAL_TM) + SUM(CC.STUDY_AFTER_TM) FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM AA JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS BB ON AA.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID = BB.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID AND BB.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TB_LMS_LESSON_STUDY_RECORD CC ON BB.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID = CC.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID -- AND CC.STD_ID = BASE.STD_ID WHERE AA.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = BASE.LCTR_SCHDL_ID ) AS ATNDLC_MNTS FROM BASE ) SELECT A.SBJCT_ID , A.SBJCTNM , A.DVCLAS_NO , A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID , A.LCTR_SCHDLNM , A.LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ , A.LCTR_TOC_LRN_SCNDS , A.ATNDLC_STSCD , A.ATNDLC_MNTS , LPAD(TRUNC(A.ATNDLC_MNTS / 60, 0), 2, '0') AS MI , LPAD(MOD(A.ATNDLC_MNTS, 60), 2, '0') AS SEC , TRUNC( CASE WHEN A.LCTR_TOC_LRN_SCNDS = 0 THEN 0 ELSE CASE WHEN A.ATNDLC_MNTS > (A.LCTR_TOC_LRN_SCNDS * 60) THEN (A.LCTR_TOC_LRN_SCNDS * 60) ELSE A.ATNDLC_MNTS END / (A.LCTR_TOC_LRN_SCNDS * 60) * 100 END, 0 ) AS PRGR_RATIO FROM STUDY_TIME A WHERE A.ATNDLC_MNTS IS NOT NULL AND A.RN = 1 ORDER BY A.SBJCTNM, A.LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ

/* SQL ID : DashboardDAO.listAdminTerm 설 명 : 관리자 학기목록 조회 */ SELECT X.CRS_SMSTR_ID , X.SMSTRNM , X.DGRS_YR , X.DGRS_SMSTR , X.NOW_SMSTRYN
FROM ( SELECT TLT.ORG_SMSTR_COHORT_ID AS CRS_SMSTR_ID , TLT.SMSTR_COHORTNM AS SMSTRNM , TLT.DGRS_YR , TLT.DGRS_SMSTR_COHORT AS DGRS_SMSTR , TLT.NOW_SMSTRYN
FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT TLCC , TB_LMS_CRS TLC , TB_LMS_ORG_SMSTR_COHORT TLT
WHERE TLCC.CRS_ID = TLC.CRS_ID
AND TLT.ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND TLCC.DELYN = 'N' AND TLCC.USEYN = 'Y' ) X WHERE 1 = 1 GROUP BY X.CRS_SMSTR_ID, X.SMSTRNM, X.DGRS_YR, X.DGRS_SMSTR, X.NOW_SMSTRYN ORDER BY X.DGRS_YR DESC, X.DGRS_SMSTR DESC

/* SQL ID : DashboardDAO.dashboardCurrentWeek 설 명 : 대시보드 현재 주차 (임시처리) */ SELECT TLSO.SBJCT_ID , TLLWS.LCTR_WKNO_SYMD , TLLWS.LCTR_WKNO_EYMD FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT TLSO , TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL TLLWS WHERE TLSO.SBJCT_ID = TLLWS.SBJCT_ID AND FN_DT() BETWEEN TLLWS.LCTR_WKNO_SYMD AND TLLWS.LCTR_WKNO_EYMD AND rownum=1 /* GROUP BY TLSO.SBJCT_ID, TLLWS.LCTR_WKNO_SYMD, TLLWS.LCTR_WKNO_EYMD */

/* SQL ID : DashboardDAO.selectLoginCntInfo 설 명 : 사용자 로그인수 정보 조회 */
SELECT ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT X.LGN_DTTM FROM ( SELECT SUBSTR(LGN_DTTM, 0,8) AS LGN_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_USER_LGN_HSTRY WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ) X GROUP BY LGN_DTTM ) ) AS TOT_CNT, ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT X.LGN_DTTM FROM ( SELECT SUBSTR(LGN_DTTM, 0,8) AS LGN_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_USER_LGN_HSTRY WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND LGN_DTTM >= TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW'), 'YYYYMMDD') AND LGN_DTTM <= TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') + 7, 'YYYYMMDD') ) X GROUP BY LGN_DTTM ) ) AS WEEK_CNT FROM DUAL

/* SQL ID : DashboardDAO.countAdminDashUser 설 명 : 관리자 메인 > 사용자 검색 수 */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM (
) Z

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT #{userId} AS userId, NVL(U.WIDGET_ID, M.WIDGET_ID) AS WIDGET_ID, NVL(U.WIDGET_NAME, M.WIDGET_NAME) AS WIDGET_NAME, NVL(U.POS_X, M.POS_X) AS POS_X, NVL(U.POS_Y, M.POS_Y) AS POS_Y, NVL(U.POS_W, M.POS_W) AS POS_W, NVL(U.POS_H, M.POS_H) AS POS_H, NVL(U.VISIBLE_YN, M.VISIBLE_YN) AS VISIBLE_YN, NVL(U.GRID_LV, M.GRID_LV) AS GRID_LV FROM TB_WIDGET_MASTER M LEFT JOIN TB_WIDGET_USER U ON M.WIDGET_ID = U.WIDGET_ID AND U.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(REGEXP_SUBSTR(M.WIDGET_ID, '[0-9]+')) ) A WHERE VISIBLE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.delete: MERGE INTO TB_WIDGET_USER TWU USING ( SELECT #{userId} AS USER_ID, #{widgetId} AS WIDGET_ID, #{widgetName} AS WIDGET_NAME, #{posX} AS POS_X, #{posY} AS POS_Y, #{posW} AS POS_W, #{posH} AS POS_H, 'N' AS VISIBLE_YN, #{gridLv} AS GRID_LV FROM dual ) SRC ON (TWU.USER_ID = SRC.USER_ID AND TWU.WIDGET_ID = SRC.WIDGET_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET TWU.POS_X = SRC.POS_X, TWU.POS_Y = SRC.POS_Y, TWU.POS_W = SRC.POS_W, TWU.POS_H = SRC.POS_H, TWU.VISIBLE_YN= SRC.VISIBLE_YN, TWU.GRID_LV = SRC.GRID_LV WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (USER_ID, WIDGET_ID, POS_X, POS_Y, POS_W, POS_H, VISIBLE_YN, GRID_LV) VALUES (SRC.USER_ID, SRC.WIDGET_ID, SRC.POS_X, SRC.POS_Y, SRC.POS_W, SRC.POS_H, SRC.VISIBLE_YN, SRC.GRID_LV)
mapper.insert: /* SQL ID : DashboardDAO.widgetStngChange 설 명 : 위젯 설정 변경 */ MERGE INTO TB_LMS_WIDGET_USE TWU USING ( SELECT #{widgetUseId} AS WIDGET_USE_ID, #{widgetId} AS WIDGET_ID, #{userId} AS USER_ID, #{widgetNm} AS WIDGETNM, #{widgetUserStngCts} AS WIDGET_USER_STNG_CTS, #{userId} AS MDFR_ID, FN_DTTM_FORMAT(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')) AS MOD_DTTM FROM DUAL ) SRC ON (TWU.USER_ID = SRC.USER_ID AND TWU.WIDGET_ID = SRC.WIDGET_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET TWU.WIDGET_USER_STNG_CTS = SRC.WIDGET_USER_STNG_CTS, TWU.MDFR_ID = SRC.MDFR_ID, TWU.MOD_DTTM = SRC.MOD_DTTM WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (WIDGET_USE_ID, WIDGET_ID, USER_ID, WIDGETNM, WIDGET_USER_STNG_CTS, RGTR_ID, REG_DTTM) VALUES (SRC.WIDGET_USE_ID, SRC.WIDGET_ID, SRC.USER_ID, SRC.WIDGETNM, SRC.WIDGET_USER_STNG_CTS, SRC.MDFR_ID, SRC.MOD_DTTM)
mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : DashboardDAO.widgetDefaultStngSelect 설 명 : 대시보드 조회 */ SELECT ORG_ID , USER_ID , WIDGET_ID , WIDGET_TYCD , WIDGET_USER_GBNCD , WIDGETNM , PVSNYN , WIDGET_STNG_CTS FROM ( SELECT TLWU.ORG_ID , TLWU.USER_ID , TLW.WIDGET_ID , TLW.WIDGET_TYCD , TLW.WIDGET_USER_GBNCD , TLW.WIDGETNM , TLW.PVSNYN , TLW.WIDGET_STNG_CTS FROM TB_LMS_WIDGET TLW LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_WIDGET_USE TLWU ON TLW.WIDGET_ID = TLWU.WIDGET_ID ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(REGEXP_SUBSTR(TLW.WIDGET_ID, '[0-9]+')) ) A WHERE 1=1
AND WIDGET_TYCD = #{authrtGrpcd}
/* SQL ID : DashboardDAO.widgetStngColrSelect 설 명 : 대시보드 배경 색 조회 */ SELECT COLOR FROM TB_WIDGET_COLOR2 WHERE VISIBLE_YN = 'Y'
/* SQL ID : DashboardDAO.getUserId 설 명 : 대시보드 위젯 사용자 조회 */ SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_WIDGET_USER2 WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
/* SQL ID : DashboardDAO.widgetStngUseCntSelect 설 명 : 위젯 변경 사용자 조회 */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_WIDGET_USE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
/* SQL ID : DashboardDAO.lgnUsrCntSelect 설 명 : 관리자 메인 > 사용자 검색 */ SELECT 15 AS cnt FROM DUAL
/* SQL ID : DashboardDAO.totStdntCntSelect 설 명 : 관리자 메인 > 사용자 검색 */ SELECT 250 AS cnt FROM DUAL
/* SQL ID : DashboardDAO.sbjctList 설 명 : 관리자 메인 > 사용자 검색 */ SELECT SBJCTNM , 1 AS totStdntCnt , 1 AS lgnUsrCnt FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT WHERE PROF_ID = #{userId}
